description_long: This house is a large, modern residential building with a sprawling, rectangular footprint and multiple wings extending from the central structure. The exterior is predominantly white with large, floor-to-ceiling windows and several sets of double doors, suggesting an emphasis on natural light and open views. The roofline features a mix of flat and gable sections, with the two side wings capped by dark gable roofs and the central section having a flat roof with skylights. The rear facade is characterized by extensive glass surfaces, including sliding doors and corner windows, providing access to outdoor spaces. The interior layout appears open, with visible staircases, multiple rooms, and open communal areas. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
description: A large, modern house with white walls, expansive glass windows, and a mix of flat and gable roofs. The design is open and contemporary, featuring multiple wings and extensive natural light.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, two gable-roofed wings, and central flat-roofed section with skylights.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, visible interior rooms, and the transition between gable and flat roof sections.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by large glass windows and sliding doors, emphasizing open access to outdoor areas.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional rooms, staircases, and the continuation of the mixed roof design.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and corner glass panels
attribute_entryway_design: Central double-door entry with minimal steps, no porch, and a clean, understated facade
